name: AnymeX
subtitle: Your new favourite tracking and management tool
description:
This is the official source for AnymeX.

For full details, check the GitHub repository:
https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX

apps.name: AnymeX
apps.subtitle: Multiservice tracking client
apps.versionDescription:
🆕 Changelog
🌟 Features
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/1f30b647) settings backup and restore, lots of fixes related to downloads and ui tweaks by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/50c62551) pure background support + notification support for downloads by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/21532a5f) manga downloads support, jxl compression support (beta), anime downloads fixes by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/864cdeac) local track support (consolidated local and online tracks, subs) by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/5ea07fca) community recommendations for movies/shows, voting, live filters, and Simkl author nav (391) by @Shebyyy


🔧 Bug Fixes & Improvements
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/0ea48742) fixed ios downloading stuck and path inconsistencies of downloads by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/3502c2bc) fixed progress stuck to 0 and cancel holdup by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/bfd1f7a7) fixed oled not affecting header on windows by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/cdc9ced2) fixed shaders, color profile, custom colors not working on player by @RyanYuuki


🎨 Style Changes
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/d782f123) minor ui tweaks by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/c0519b51) minor ui tweaks by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/99f8c656) ui changes on settings's sheet by @RyanYuuki


🧹 Chores & Documentation
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/c8521050) bump version to v3.0.7 (patch release) by @RyanYuuki
• [֍](https://github.com/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/commit/a5ae67b0) fixed mac build issue by @RyanYuuki


![Total Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/total?style=for-the-badge&label=TOTAL%20DOWNLOADS&labelColor=black&color=white) ![Current Release](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/RyanYuuki/AnymeX/v3.0.7/total?style=for-the-badge&label=CURRENT%20RELEASE&labelColor=black&color=white)
apps.localizedDescription: AnymeX is a multiservice tracking client, with AniList, MyAnimeList & Simkl support!
